case_title: GALAMAY, CONNIE F. VS OCAMPO, HECTOR GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALAMAY, CONNIE F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OCAMPO, HECTOR GOMEZ $611.90 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $663.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF;PAID $15.40 CASH;MAILED COPIES TO DEFT; TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 21 DAYS;TO FOLDER FOR COMM.'S DECISION.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO, HECTOR GOMEZ HEARING SET FOR MAR-18-2004 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2004, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO, HECTOR GOMEZ
ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION HEARING TO BE DISCHARGED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-02-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-06-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TO OBTAIN AN INTERPRETER.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GALAMAY, CONNIE F. AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO, HECTOR GOMEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OCAMPO, HECTOR GOMEZ

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-06-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-03-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 9/3/03 @ 3:30 PM FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE HIS OWN INTERPRETER. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES.
NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION WAS FILED. DEFT APPEARED ON THE HEARING DATE. PLTF FAILED TO APPEAR.
PLFT'S REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED 9/30/03; REQUEST DENIED BY COMM. REQUEST UNTIMELY PER CCP 1008. NO NEW FACTS ALLEGED. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES
